CodecoraDeveloper Tools for AI Agents

Open-source tools that keep your data local, your agents smart, and your code clean.

Explore Projects
GitHub
🧠

Uteke — Semantic Memory

Offline-first semantic memory engine for AI agents. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies, 30ms recall. Fully offline, zero API keys.

Read the docs

🔍

Cora CLI — Code Review

CLI-first AI code review with BYOK. Supports diff, scan, branch modes and pre-commit hooks. 100% open source.

View on GitHub

🪤

TrapFall — Error Capture

Lightweight self-hosted error capture engine. Sentry-compatible API, built with Rust and SvelteKit 5.

View on GitHub

Released under the Apache 2.0 and MIT Licenses.
